subject: Build chat frontend with auto-guest-registration
description: Create a web frontend (single HTML+JS file or minimal SPA) for gacha.agency that: 1) Auto-registers anonymous guests via POST /api/auth/register on first visit (store token in localStorage), 2) Connects WebSocket to /api/chat/ws?token=TOKEN, 3) Renders chat UI with companion messages, typing indicators, and advisor responses, 4) Shows companion party/squad. No sign-in wall — users interact immediately. Later they can optionally upgrade to email auth.

closed_reason: Wrong task — frontend already exists at app.gacha.agency (gacha-agency repo, Next.js)
